name: architecture_and_security
config_yaml:
version: 1
analysis:
  enabled: true
  include: ["src/**"]
  exclude: []
recommendations:
  enabled: true
  severity_threshold: low
  categories: [architecture, security]
rag:
  max_files: 10
  max_file_size_kb: 120

repo_context.content:
import sqlite3

CONNECTION = sqlite3.connect("app.db")
CURRENT_USER = None


def set_current_user(user):
    global CURRENT_USER
    CURRENT_USER = user


def create_invoice(total):
    CONNECTION.execute("INSERT INTO invoices(total) VALUES (?)", (total,))
    CONNECTION.commit()
